description_long: This is a detached single-story bungalow with a prominent gable roof and a covered front porch supported by columns. The house is surrounded by a neatly fenced yard with green grass, a driveway leading to the front, and a detached carport or garage structure to one side. The property features several mature trees, providing shade and visual interest, and the backyard is spacious and open. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with additional windows on the sides and rear for ample natural light. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored siding, and the roof is a darker shade, likely asphalt shingles. The overall setting suggests a suburban or residential neighborhood context.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, fenced yard, and detached carport, surrounded by grass and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, driveway, and two symmetrical front windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, fenced yard, and detached carport structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, rear windows, and the carport to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible trees, side yard, and the back of the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
